title: Phase 3C: Admin - user management (list, detail, create, API, service)
description: Build the user management module: user list page with DataTable, user detail/edit page with profile/roles/permissions, create user dialog, user API routes (CRUD + role assignment), and user service.
steps: Create src/lib/services/user.service.ts with user CRUD, search, role assignment, status management
Create src/app/api/users/route.ts with GET (list) and POST (create) endpoints
Create src/app/api/users/[id]/route.ts with GET, PUT, DELETE endpoints
Create src/app/api/users/[id]/roles/route.ts with role assignment endpoints
Create src/app/(dashboard)/admin/users/page.tsx with user list DataTable
Implement search, filter by role/branch/status, bulk actions
Include tabs: Profile, Roles & Permissions, Preferences, Audit Log
